overall.description: A dark, atmospheric night scene from a video game showing heavy rainfall at an abandoned or unfinished concrete construction site. The camera remains mostly stationary with minimal movement, capturing tall overgrown vegetation in the foreground and a multi-level concrete structure silhouetted against the stormy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned construction site with overgrown vegetation during storm

events.description: distant lightning flash briefly illuminates the sky and building silhouette

agents.ego_description: standing still in the rain facing the abandoned building, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: multi-level concrete structure with vertical posts on the roof, silhouetted against the dark sky
overgrown vegetation swaying in the wind and rain
metal fencing running along the left side of the structure
dark silhouette of trees visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a stormy night at an abandoned construction site, with heavy rain falling steadily. An unfinished concrete building looms on the left, partially obscured by darkness, while tall grass fills the foreground. At approximately four seconds, a distant lightning flash briefly illuminates the sky, revealing more detail of the building's silhouette before returning to darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric view of a stormy construction site that shifts from deep shadow to a momentary, stark illumination. It begins amidst a heavy downpour at night, where tall grass fills the foreground and an unfinished concrete building looms as a dark silhouette on the left. As the rain falls steadily, the oppressive darkness persists until a sudden, distant flash of lightning tears across the sky. This burst of light briefly reveals the intricate details of the building's skeletal structure before the scene finally recedes back into the gloom of the stormy night.
